alerts.title: Israeli strikes pound Lebanon and Gaza, killing infant and police, as Iran deal nears
alerts.summary: The Guardian and Reuters report Israeli bombardment is reducing buildings to craters in southern Lebanon while strikes in central Gaza killed a six-month-old boy with his parents and at least five police officers plus a 13-year-old (Al Jazeera, The National). The escalation runs parallel to reports of an emerging US-Iran framework, with Israeli officials publicly calling the deal 'bad' (Jerusalem Post).

alerts.title: Russia launches one of war's largest barrages on Kyiv using Zircon and Oreshnik
alerts.summary: Rybar (~40K views) reports overnight strikes on Kyiv described as one of the longest and most saturated attacks of the war, with Zircon hypersonic and Oreshnik missiles among the munitions used against aviation-repair and industrial targets. DeepState UA notes simultaneous drone and missile impacts in Sumy, Cherkasy and Dnipropetrovsk regions plus the Myrhorod oil depot.

alerts.title: Republican hawks openly revolt against Trump's Iran framework as 'nightmare for Israel'
alerts.summary: US sentiment has swung to 57% negative with 'Massie', 'GOP', 'lawmakers', 'Republican' and 'criticism' surging in the word cloud alongside Rubio and Gabbard. Middle East Eye explicitly frames Republican hawks as attacking the emerging Iran deal as a 'nightmare for Israel,' marking an intra-coalition fracture as Trump simultaneously tells negotiators not to rush.

alerts.title: Iranian readout: draft deal bars US and allies from attacking Iran or its proxies
alerts.summary: The Times of Israel cites an Iranian report stating the emerging agreement would commit the US and its allies not to attack Iran or its allies, with reciprocal Iranian restraint. Fortune separately reports Tehran is growing suspicious of Washington's generous ceasefire terms, fearing a setup for attack — a notable signal of fragility around the Hormuz framework.

alerts.title: Brent holds at $100 with threat level pinned at 9 'CRITICAL — Imminent Escalation'
alerts.summary: Global metrics show Brent crude at $100.21 and the Iranian rial free-market rate at 1,322,792/USD while the dashboard threat indicator remains at 9/10 ('CRITICAL — IMMINENT ESCALATION'). Houthi and Iraqi Shiite Militia (PMF) statuses both stay 'Elevated,' and DefenseScoop reports the US is deploying an 'umbrella' of defense and tech assets to shield Strait of Hormuz shipping.

analysis_note: A fragile US-Iran Hormuz framework is being publicly attacked by Republican hawks and Israeli officials even as Israeli strikes intensify in Lebanon and Gaza and Russia executes one of its largest combined missile barrages on Kyiv — keeping the dashboard threat indicator at CRITICAL.
